characters.name: Abumi Zaku
characters.description: Abumi Zaku is one of the three sound genin sent to the chuunin exams. He was surgically altered with hollow tubes in his arms, allowing him to create waves of compressed air.

skills.name: Air Cutter
skills.descriptionRaw: Zaku fires a blast of supersonic air at one enemy, dealing 25 damage to them. The following turn, Zaku can use 'Extreme Air Cutter'.
skills.descriptionText: Zaku fires a blast of supersonic air at one enemy, dealing 25 damage to them. The following turn, Zaku can use 'Extreme Air Cutter'.

skills.name: Wall of Air
skills.descriptionRaw: Zaku alters his air wave to protect one ally for 1 turn. The first harmful skill used on that ally will be countered. If successful, Zaku will instantly apply 'Air Cutter' on the countered enemy. This skill is invisible.
skills.descriptionText: Zaku alters his air wave to protect one ally for 1 turn. The first harmful skill used on that ally will be countered. If successful, Zaku will instantly apply 'Air Cutter' on the countered enemy. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Extreme Air Cutter
skills.descriptionRaw: Zaku boosts his air waves to a frightening level and deals 45 damage to all enemies. Afterwards, Zaku gains 1 random chakra.
skills.descriptionText: Zaku boosts his air waves to a frightening level and deals 45 damage to all enemies. Afterwards, Zaku gains 1 random chakra.

skills.name: Airwave Deflection
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Abumi Zaku invulnerable for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Abumi Zaku invulnerable for 1 turn.

characters.name: Aburame Shino
characters.description: A Genin from Team 8, Shino is the successor of the Aburame clan, and a very reserved and tactical fighter. Using the bugs that live inside his body, Shino is able to leech the chakra off his enemies, or protect his entire team.

skills.name: Chakra Leach
skills.descriptionRaw: Shino directs his chakra draining bugs to one enemy, <Damage>dealing 20 affliction<Damage> damage and <Effects>stealing 1 taijutsu or genjutsu chakra<Effects> from their chakra pool. If this skill successfully steals a chakra from the opponent, this skill will cost an extra random chakra for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: Shino directs his chakra draining bugs to one enemy, dealing 20 affliction damage and stealing 1 taijutsu or genjutsu chakra from their chakra pool. If this skill successfully steals a chakra from the opponent, this skill will cost an extra random chakra for 1 turn.

skills.name: Female Bug
skills.descriptionRaw: Shino directs one of his female bugs to attach itself. For 4 turns, <SkillName>'Chakra Leach'<SkillName> will <Improvements>deal 5 additional damage<Improvements> to one enemy. During this time, if that enemy <Classes>uses a new harmful skill<Classes>, they will <Effects>deal 5 less non-affliction damage<Effects> for 1 turn. This skill stacks.
skills.descriptionText: Shino directs one of his female bugs to attach itself. For 4 turns, 'Chakra Leach' will deal 5 additional damage to one enemy. During this time, if that enemy uses a new harmful skill, they will deal 5 less non-affliction damage for 1 turn. This skill stacks.

skills.name: Bug Wall
skills.descriptionRaw: Shino calls millions of bugs to create a wall protecting himself and his allies and granting them 20 <Defense>points of permanent destructible defense<Defense>.
skills.descriptionText: Shino calls millions of bugs to create a wall protecting himself and his allies and granting them 20 points of permanent destructible defense.

skills.name: Bug Clone
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Aburame Shino <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Aburame Shino invulnerable for 1 turn.

characters.name: Aburame Shino (S)
characters.description: Still as mysterious and secretive as ever, Shino has improved greatly over the years, learning and practicing with his loyal bugs. With his new found mastery, Shino can disable enemies even harder while slowly waiting for his bugs to erupt from their bodies and destroy them.

skills.name: Insect Swarm
skills.descriptionRaw: Shino sends out wave of his insect army at one enemy, <Damage>dealing 15 affliction damage<Damage> to them for 3 turns. The following 3 turns, that enemy will be <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> to all <Classes>friendly skills<Classes> each turn and during this time this skill will be <Improvements>replaced<Improvements> by <SkillName>'Insect Consumption'<SkillName>.
skills.descriptionText: Shino sends out wave of his insect army at one enemy, dealing 15 affliction damage to them for 3 turns. The following 3 turns, that enemy will be invulnerable to all friendly skills each turn and during this time this skill will be replaced by 'Insect Consumption'.

skills.name: Insect Barricade
skills.descriptionRaw: The following turn, the first <Classes>new harmful skill<Classes> used on himself or one ally will be <Defense>countered<Defense>, <SkillName>'Parasitic Giant Beetle Infestation'<SkillName> will be placed on the countered enemy and then activated. If this skill does <Defense>not counter<Defense> an enemy, Shino will <Effects>gain 1 Bloodline chakra<Effects>. <Invisible>This skill is invisible<Invisible>.
skills.descriptionText: The following turn, the first new harmful skill used on himself or one ally will be countered, 'Parasitic Giant Beetle Infestation' will be placed on the countered enemy and then activated. If this skill does not counter an enemy, Shino will gain 1 Bloodline chakra. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Parasitic Giant Beetle Infestation
skills.descriptionRaw: Shino infects one enemy with a small bug. 3 turns after this skill has been used, the bug bursts out, <Damage>dealing 30 affliction damage<Damage> to them and <Effects>activating<Effects> all other <Effects>copies<Effects> of this skill on that enemy. <Invisible>This skill is invisible<Invisible>.
skills.descriptionText: Shino infects one enemy with a small bug. 3 turns after this skill has been used, the bug bursts out, dealing 30 affliction damage to them and activating all other copies of this skill on that enemy. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Insect Cocoon
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Aburame Shino (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Aburame Shino (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Insect Consumption
skills.descriptionRaw: Shino commands his insects to drain the chakra of one enemy affected by <SkillName>'Insect Swarm'<SkillName> <Effects>stealing 1 random chakra<Effects> from them and <Improvements>increasing the damage that enemy receives<Improvements> from <SkillName>'Insect Swarm'<SkillName> by 5 that turn.
skills.descriptionText: Shino commands his insects to drain the chakra of one enemy affected by 'Insect Swarm' stealing 1 random chakra from them and increasing the damage that enemy receives from 'Insect Swarm' by 5 that turn.

characters.name: Aburame Torune (S)
characters.description: A member of the Aburame clan, and a member of Anbu Root, Torune can almost be said to have no personality of his own, other than his undying loyalty to Danzo. Unlike other members of his clan, Torune employs a unique type of bug that lets him outright destroy both flesh and chakra.

skills.name: Armor of Venom
skills.descriptionRaw: Torune applies one 'Venom Beetle' to one enemy and gains 15 destructible defense. During this time, Torune can use this skill again for 1 random to apply a 'Venom Beetle' to one enemy. The enemy that destroys this destructible defense will have a 'Venom Beetle' applied to them.
skills.descriptionText: Torune applies one 'Venom Beetle' to one enemy and gains 15 destructible defense. During this time, Torune can use this skill again for 1 random to apply a 'Venom Beetle' to one enemy. The enemy that destroys this destructible defense will have a 'Venom Beetle' applied to them.

skills.name: Jar of Poison
skills.descriptionRaw: Torune applies one 'Venom Beetle' to each enemy and gains 35 destructible defense. During this time, Torune can use this skill again for 1 random to apply a 'Venom Beetle' to each enemy. The enemy that destroys this destructible defense will have a 'Venom Beetle' applied to them.
skills.descriptionText: Torune applies one 'Venom Beetle' to each enemy and gains 35 destructible defense. During this time, Torune can use this skill again for 1 random to apply a 'Venom Beetle' to each enemy. The enemy that destroys this destructible defense will have a 'Venom Beetle' applied to them.

skills.name: Venom Explosion
skills.descriptionRaw: Torune targets any enemy affected by at least one 'Venom Beetle', removing 1 random chakra from them for each 'Venom Beetle' on them.
skills.descriptionText: Torune targets any enemy affected by at least one 'Venom Beetle', removing 1 random chakra from them for each 'Venom Beetle' on them.

skills.name: Super Leap
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Aburame Torune (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Aburame Torune (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Venom Beetle
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill deals 5 affliction damage permanently.
skills.descriptionText: This skill deals 5 affliction damage permanently.

characters.name: Akadou Yoroi
characters.description: Part of the three man team of Kabuto during the Chuunin Exams working as spies, Yoroi has a special ability that allows him to absorb his opponents energy.

skills.name: Chakra and Life Absorption
skills.descriptionRaw: Yoroi endows his attacks. The following 3 turns, <SkillName>'Draining Assault'<SkillName> and <SkillName>'Energy Drain'<SkillName> may be used.
skills.descriptionText: Yoroi endows his attacks. The following 3 turns, 'Draining Assault' and 'Energy Drain' may be used.

skills.name: Energy Drain
skills.descriptionRaw: Yoroi touches one enemy, <Damage>stealing 20 health<Damage> from them for 1 turn and <Effects>lowering their non-affliction damage by 5<Effects> until that enemy <Classes>uses a new damage skill<Classes>. During <SkillName>'Draining Assault'<SkillName>, this skill will <Effects>steal 1 bloodline chakra<Effects>. Requires <SkillName>'Chakra and Life Absorption'<SkillName> to be used.
skills.descriptionText: Yoroi touches one enemy, stealing 20 health from them for 1 turn and lowering their non-affliction damage by 5 until that enemy uses a new damage skill. During 'Draining Assault', this skill will steal 1 bloodline chakra. Requires 'Chakra and Life Absorption' to be used.

skills.name: Draining Assault
skills.descriptionRaw: Yoroi charges at one enemy with multiple energy drains, <Damage>stealing 12 health<Damage> from them for 3 turns and <Effects>stealing 1 bloodline or ninjutsu chakra<Effects> each turn. During this time, <SkillName>'Energy Drain'<SkillName> will be <Improvements>improved<Improvements>. Requires <SkillName>'Chakra and Life Absorption'<SkillName> to be used.
skills.descriptionText: Yoroi charges at one enemy with multiple energy drains, stealing 12 health from them for 3 turns and stealing 1 bloodline or ninjutsu chakra each turn. During this time, 'Energy Drain' will be improved. Requires 'Chakra and Life Absorption' to be used.

skills.name: Chakra Block
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Akadou Yoroi <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Akadou Yoroi invulnerable for 1 turn.

characters.name: Akatsuchi (S)
characters.description: Akatsuchi (S) is a shinobi of the Hidden Rock Village. Akatsuchi is a powerful shinobi who uses brute strength and earth style jutsus in combat.

skills.name: High Speed Assault
skills.descriptionRaw: Using High Speed Assault Akatsuchi (S) deals 25 damage to 1 enemy. The following 3 turns, this skill will cost 1 additional random chakra and will deal 15 additional damage.
skills.descriptionText: Using High Speed Assault Akatsuchi (S) deals 25 damage to 1 enemy. The following 3 turns, this skill will cost 1 additional random chakra and will deal 15 additional damage.

skills.name: Golem
skills.descriptionRaw: Akatsuchi (S) uses Golem on all enemies dealing 15 damage to them. The following 3 turns, this skill will cost 1 additional random chakra and will deal 10 additional damage.
skills.descriptionText: Akatsuchi (S) uses Golem on all enemies dealing 15 damage to them. The following 3 turns, this skill will cost 1 additional random chakra and will deal 10 additional damage.

skills.name: Golem Chakra Devour
skills.descriptionRaw: Akatsuchi's Golem devours one enemy's chakra, removing all destructible defense from them, dealing 10 piercing damage to that enemy and stunning their harmful skills for 1 turn. The following 2 turns, Akatsuchi's skills will cost 1 less random chakra.
skills.descriptionText: Akatsuchi's Golem devours one enemy's chakra, removing all destructible defense from them, dealing 10 piercing damage to that enemy and stunning their harmful skills for 1 turn. The following 2 turns, Akatsuchi's skills will cost 1 less random chakra.

skills.name: Akatsuchi Retreat
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Akatsuchi (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Akatsuchi (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

characters.name: Akimichi Chouji
characters.description: A Genin from Team 10, Chouji is a member of the Akimichi clan, a large eater, and a close friend to his allies. While innately strong, Chouji is able to sacrifice his own life using special pills from his clan to become insanely powerful.

skills.name: Partial Double Size
skills.descriptionRaw: Chouji doubles the size of his arms and attacks one enemy, <Damage>dealing 20 damage<Damage> to them.
skills.descriptionText: Chouji doubles the size of his arms and attacks one enemy, dealing 20 damage to them.

skills.name: Meat Tank
skills.descriptionRaw: Chouji transforms into a meat tank, becoming <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 2 turns. If targetable, one enemy will be <Damage>dealt 10 damage<Damage> for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionText: Chouji transforms into a meat tank, becoming invulnerable for 2 turns. If targetable, one enemy will be dealt 10 damage for 2 turns.

skills.name: Akimichi Pills
skills.descriptionRaw: Chouji eats a pill, <Damage>taking 15 affliction damage<Damage>*. <SkillName>'Partial Double Size'<SkillName> will <Improvements>deal 20 additional damage<Improvements> and <SkillName>'Meat Tank'<SkillName> will <Improvements>deal 10 additional damage<Improvements> permanently. Each use of this skill will <Damage>deal 5 more affliction damage<Damage> and will <Improvements>cost 2 additional random chakra<Improvements>. Chouji can only eat <Classes>three<Classes> pills.
skills.descriptionText: Chouji eats a pill, taking 15 affliction damage*. 'Partial Double Size' will deal 20 additional damage and 'Meat Tank' will deal 10 additional damage permanently. Each use of this skill will deal 5 more affliction damage and will cost 2 additional random chakra. Chouji can only eat three pills.

skills.name: Effortless Block
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Akimichi Chouji <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Akimichi Chouji invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Passive: Butterfly Mode
skills.descriptionRaw: When Chouji <Improvements>eats the three pills<Improvements>, he will activate the Butterfly Mode, gaining 75% <Defense>unpierceable damage reduction<Defense> permanently and <Effects>gaining 1 random chakra<Effects> every turn.
skills.descriptionText: When Chouji eats the three pills, he will activate the Butterfly Mode, gaining 75% unpierceable damage reduction permanently and gaining 1 random chakra every turn.

characters.name: Akimichi Chouji (S)
characters.description: After nearly three years, Chouji has grown into a reliable ninja and is now a chuunin. His appetite has grown and so has his body, but now he is truly mastering the Akimichi clan techniques.

skills.name: Mega Palm Thrusts
skills.descriptionRaw: Expanding his arms for more inertia, Chouji <Damage>deals 30 damage<Damage> to one enemy and increase the cost of their harmful skills by 1 random chakra for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: Expanding his arms for more inertia, Chouji deals 30 damage to one enemy and increase the cost of their harmful skills by 1 random chakra for 1 turn.

skills.name: Spiked Meat Tank
skills.descriptionRaw: If used on an enemy: That enemy will be <Damage>dealt 25 damage<Damage> and Chouji becomes <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn. If used on himself or an ally: For 1 turn, all <Classes>non-mental<Classes> skills used on that ally will be <Defense>countered<Defense> and any <Defense>countered<Defense> enemy will be <Damage>dealt 10 piercing damage<Damage>*; Invisible. (Cooldown: 2).
skills.descriptionText: If used on an enemy: That enemy will be dealt 25 damage and Chouji becomes invulnerable for 1 turn. If used on himself or an ally: For 1 turn, all non-mental skills used on that ally will be countered and any countered enemy will be dealt 10 piercing damage*; Invisible. (Cooldown: 2).

skills.name: Expansion Technique
skills.descriptionRaw: Chouji grows gigantic, gaining 45 <Defense>destructible defense<Defense> for 3 turns. The following 3 turns, <SkillName>'Mega Palm Thrusts'<SkillName> will target all enemies and <SkillName>'Spiked Meat Tank'<SkillName><Improvements> will target all enemies<Improvements> or <Improvements>will target all allies<Improvements> if used on an ally.
skills.descriptionText: Chouji grows gigantic, gaining 45 destructible defense for 3 turns. The following 3 turns, 'Mega Palm Thrusts' will target all enemies and 'Spiked Meat Tank' will target all enemies or will target all allies if used on an ally.

skills.name: Chouji Leap
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Akimichi Chouji (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Akimichi Chouji (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

characters.name: Akimichi Chouza (S)
characters.description: Akimichi Chouza (S) is the leader of the Akimichi clan and the father of Chouji. He is a jounin and he is skilled in all of his clan's secret techniques.

skills.name: Chain Bind
skills.descriptionRaw: Chouza slows down an enemy, dealing 10 damage to them and lowering all physical and chakra non-affliction damage they deal by 10 for 1 turn. Chouza's team will also gain 10 destructible defense.
skills.descriptionText: Chouza slows down an enemy, dealing 10 damage to them and lowering all physical and chakra non-affliction damage they deal by 10 for 1 turn. Chouza's team will also gain 10 destructible defense.

skills.name: Jounin Meat Tank
skills.descriptionRaw: Chouza begins rolling, dealing 15 damage to all enemies for 2 turns. During this time, his team will gain 15 destructible defense each turn.
skills.descriptionText: Chouza begins rolling, dealing 15 damage to all enemies for 2 turns. During this time, his team will gain 15 destructible defense each turn.

skills.name: Expansion Smash
skills.descriptionRaw: If used on an enemy, for 1 turn, the next non-mental harmful skill they use will be countered. If used on an ally, for 1 turn, the next non-mental harmful skill used on them will be countered. The countered enemy will receive 20 damage. This skill is invisible and ignores invulnerability.
skills.descriptionText: If used on an enemy, for 1 turn, the next non-mental harmful skill they use will be countered. If used on an ally, for 1 turn, the next non-mental harmful skill used on them will be countered. The countered enemy will receive 20 damage. This skill is invisible and ignores invulnerability.

skills.name: Chouza Block
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Akimichi Chouza (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Akimichi Chouza (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

characters.name: Animal Path Pein (S)
characters.description: Animal Path Pein (S) is one of the six paths of Pein. This Path is able to summon a variety of different beasts for different purposes.

skills.name: Cerberus Hydra
skills.descriptionRaw: Animal Path Pein summons a giant multiple headed dog, dealing 20 damage to all enemies. For 2 turns, any enemy that uses a skill will be dealt 15 piercing damage.
skills.descriptionText: Animal Path Pein summons a giant multiple headed dog, dealing 20 damage to all enemies. For 2 turns, any enemy that uses a skill will be dealt 15 piercing damage.

skills.name: Drill Bird
skills.descriptionRaw: Animal Path Pein summons a giant drill-beaked bird, dealing 20 damage to one enemy and 20 damage to another random enemy for 2 turns. The following turn, 'Cerberus Hydra' will cost 1 ninjutsu and 1 random chakra instead.
skills.descriptionText: Animal Path Pein summons a giant drill-beaked bird, dealing 20 damage to one enemy and 20 damage to another random enemy for 2 turns. The following turn, 'Cerberus Hydra' will cost 1 ninjutsu and 1 random chakra instead.

skills.name: Invisible Chameleon
skills.descriptionRaw: Animal Path Pein summons his chameleon, protecting himself or an ally. For 4 turns, that ally will ignore stun effects and gains 50% damage reduction. This skill is invisible.
skills.descriptionText: Animal Path Pein summons his chameleon, protecting himself or an ally. For 4 turns, that ally will ignore stun effects and gains 50% damage reduction. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Panda Defense
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill can be used on himself or an ally, making himself or that ally <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill can be used on himself or an ally, making himself or that ally invulnerable for 1 turn.

characters.name: Ao (S)
characters.description: Ao (S) is a hunter-nin of the Hidden Mist Village and a skilled sensor. Ao is a veteran shinobi who has been in many battles, one of his spoils of war is the byakugan he possesses.

skills.name: Stolen Byakugan
skills.descriptionRaw: Ao uses his Byakugan on an enemy. For 3 turns, any new invisible skill used by that enemy will be visible and each time they use a new skill they will take 50% more damage from Ranged skills for 1 turn. This skill is invisible and cannot be countered or reflected.
skills.descriptionText: Ao uses his Byakugan on an enemy. For 3 turns, any new invisible skill used by that enemy will be visible and each time they use a new skill they will take 50% more damage from Ranged skills for 1 turn. This skill is invisible and cannot be countered or reflected.

skills.name: Sensing Barrier
skills.descriptionRaw: Ao uses his sensing barrier on an enemy, making them unable to reduce damage or become invulnerable and dealing 20 damage to them for 1 turn. The following turn, that enemy will receive an additional 5 damage from 'Sensing Barrier'.
skills.descriptionText: Ao uses his sensing barrier on an enemy, making them unable to reduce damage or become invulnerable and dealing 20 damage to them for 1 turn. The following turn, that enemy will receive an additional 5 damage from 'Sensing Barrier'.

skills.name: Byakugan Seal
skills.descriptionRaw: For 1 turn, the first non mental skill used on Ao (S) will be countered. This skill is invisible the first time it is used and may only be used once. After the following 2 turns, this skill will be re-applied. During this time, if 'Sensing Barrier' is used this skill will be instantly re-applied.
skills.descriptionText: For 1 turn, the first non mental skill used on Ao (S) will be countered. This skill is invisible the first time it is used and may only be used once. After the following 2 turns, this skill will be re-applied. During this time, if 'Sensing Barrier' is used this skill will be instantly re-applied.

skills.name: Reactionary Defense
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Ao (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Ao (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

characters.name: Asura Path Pein (S)
characters.description: Asura Path Pein (S) is one of the six paths of Pein. His body style is similar to a puppet filled with hidden weapons.

skills.name: Chakra Burst
skills.descriptionRaw: Asura prevents one enemy from becoming invulnerable or reducing damage, then deals 20 damage for 1 turn. During this time, any enemy that uses a new skill on him will take 10 damage. This skill will be replaced permanently.
skills.descriptionText: Asura prevents one enemy from becoming invulnerable or reducing damage, then deals 20 damage for 1 turn. During this time, any enemy that uses a new skill on him will take 10 damage. This skill will be replaced permanently.

skills.name: Cluster Bombs
skills.descriptionRaw: Asura Path bombs all enemies, dealing 20 piercing damage to them. For 1 turn, any enemy that uses a new harmful physical or chakra skill will be dealt 10 piercing damage.
skills.descriptionText: Asura Path bombs all enemies, dealing 20 piercing damage to them. For 1 turn, any enemy that uses a new harmful physical or chakra skill will be dealt 10 piercing damage.

skills.name: Heat Seeker
skills.descriptionRaw: Asura Path uses Heat Seeker on one enemy. After 3 turns, that enemy will take 25 piercing damage. This skill is invisible until triggered. This skill stacks.
skills.descriptionText: Asura Path uses Heat Seeker on one enemy. After 3 turns, that enemy will take 25 piercing damage. This skill is invisible until triggered. This skill stacks.

skills.name: Rinnegan Evasion
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Asura Path Pein (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Asura Path Pein (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Crown Shockwave
skills.descriptionRaw: Asura Path deals 20 damage to all enemies. The following turn, they will be dealt 5 affliction damage. This skill becomes 'Chakra Burst' after being used.
skills.descriptionText: Asura Path deals 20 damage to all enemies. The following turn, they will be dealt 5 affliction damage. This skill becomes 'Chakra Burst' after being used.

characters.name: Baki
characters.description: Baki is the Jounin team leader of Gaara, Temari, and Kankuro. A mysterious and perhaps devious but loyal man, he specializes in wind element jutsu.

skills.name: Wind Blade
skills.descriptionRaw: Baki conjures a maelstrom of blade-like wind and <Damage>does 40 piercing damage<Damage> to one enemy.
skills.descriptionText: Baki conjures a maelstrom of blade-like wind and does 40 piercing damage to one enemy.

skills.name: Sudden Strike
skills.descriptionRaw: A simple, blindingly fast attack leaving an illusionary trail to throw off enemies. Baki <Damage>does 20 piercing damage<Damage> to one enemy.
skills.descriptionText: A simple, blindingly fast attack leaving an illusionary trail to throw off enemies. Baki does 20 piercing damage to one enemy.

skills.name: Flak Jacket
skills.descriptionRaw: Baki puts on a specialized flak jacket from the sand village on himself, or one ally granting that character 50 <Defense>destructible defense<Defense> for 4 turns. During this time, that character will <Defense>ignore all harmful effects except damage<Defense> until this <Effects>defense is destroyed<Effects>.
skills.descriptionText: Baki puts on a specialized flak jacket from the sand village on himself, or one ally granting that character 50 destructible defense for 4 turns. During this time, that character will ignore all harmful effects except damage until this defense is destroyed.

skills.name: Baki Teleportation
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Baki <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Baki invulnerable for 1 turn.

characters.name: Chiyo (S)
characters.description: The grandmother of Sasori(s) and elder ninja of the Sand Village, Chiyo is a well known and accomplished puppet master and builder.

skills.name: White Secret Attack Rampage
skills.descriptionRaw: Chiyo directs her puppets to devastate the battlefield, dealing 20 damage to a random enemy for 1 turn. The following turn, a second random enemy will also be dealt 20 damage. The second target is invisible. The next use of 'Sanbou Kyuukai' will deal 5 aditional damage. This skill stacks.
skills.descriptionText: Chiyo directs her puppets to devastate the battlefield, dealing 20 damage to a random enemy for 1 turn. The following turn, a second random enemy will also be dealt 20 damage. The second target is invisible. The next use of 'Sanbou Kyuukai' will deal 5 aditional damage. This skill stacks.

skills.name: Sanbou Kyuukai
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill deals 20 piercing damage to one enemy and stuns their non-mental skills for 1 turn. Also for 1 turn, that enemy will receive 5 additional damage from all sources. This skill ignores invulnerability.
skills.descriptionText: This skill deals 20 piercing damage to one enemy and stuns their non-mental skills for 1 turn. Also for 1 turn, that enemy will receive 5 additional damage from all sources. This skill ignores invulnerability.

skills.name: Ally Puppetry
skills.descriptionRaw: Chiyo controls one ally for 3 turns. Each turn, that ally will nullify the first physical or chakra non-affliction skill used on them. During this time, their melee skills will deal 25% more damage. The following 2 turns, this skill will be replaced. This skill ends if Chiyo is killed.
skills.descriptionText: Chiyo controls one ally for 3 turns. Each turn, that ally will nullify the first physical or chakra non-affliction skill used on them. During this time, their melee skills will deal 25% more damage. The following 2 turns, this skill will be replaced. This skill ends if Chiyo is killed.

skills.name: Chakra Shield
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Chiyo (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Chiyo (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: One's Own Life Reincarnation

skills.descriptionText: ET Fuguki instantly applies a stack of 'Hair Spikes' to the enemy team, and his team gains 15 points of destructible defense for 2 turns. During this time, any enemy that destroys this destructible defense will gain a stack of 'Hair Spikes'.

During this time, any enemy that uses a new harmful skill will gain a stack of 'Hair Spikes'. This skill ends if Fuguki dies.

characters.name: Edo Tensei Fuu (S)
characters.description: Reanimated by Kabuto during the Fourth Shinobi World War, Fuu has had the Seven-Tails, Choumei, sealed back inside her. Having been made into one of Tobi's new Six Paths of Pain along with the other fallen jinchuuriki, Fuu is under his full control, skillfully utilizing the Seven-Tails' various insect abilities.

characters.name: Edo Tensei Ginkaku (S)
characters.description: Edo Tensei Ginkaku (S) is one half of the legendary gold and silver brothers of the Hidden Cloud Village. They were the most notorious criminals in the history of the Hidden Cloud.

skills.descriptionText: Ginkaku deals 20 piercing damage to one enemy. For this turn, any new stun effects used on that enemy will last 1 additional turn.

characters.name: Edo Tensei Haku (S)

characters.name: Edo Tensei Hanzo (S)
characters.description: Edo Tensei Hanzo (S) has been summoned back from the dead in the middle of a battlefield and he is not happy about it. Edo Hanzo (S) will engage anyone that crosses his path as he did when he was alive.

If triggered, the target <Damage>takes 20 affliction damage<Damage>. <Invisible>This skill is invisible<Invisible>.

Healing effects and destructible defense will be ignored by all characters.
Any character that becomes invulnerable takes 3 permanent affliction damage. This passive cannot be ignored

characters.name: Edo Tensei Itachi (S)
characters.description: One of the five past Akatsuki members reanimated by Kabuto during the Fourth Shinobi World War, Itachi sees this as an opportunity to pursue his true goals and set things right with Naruto and Sasuke. Freeing himself from Kabuto's shackles, Itachi unleashes the full power of the Uchiha with his deathless body.

skills.descriptionRaw: Itachi unleashes a volley of fire-infused shuriken, dealing 10 affliction damage to all enemies. For 1 turn, if they use a new harmful skill, they will have 'Phoenix Flower Shuriken' re-applied on them.

characters.name: Edo Tensei Jiroubou (S)
characters.description: Reanimated by Kabuto during the Fourth Shinobi World War along with his Sound Four teammates, Jiroubou is back on the battlefield, and is out for blood. With immense brute force through his mastery of the Cursed Seal, as well as his Earth Release and chakra absorption techniques, Jiroubou is a threat to anyone.

skills.descriptionText: Jiroubou strikes an enemy dealing 25 damage to them and giving them 1 stack of 'Dark Chakra Unseal'.

skills.descriptionText: Jiroubou throws a giant rock at the enemy team, dealing 10 damage to them and giving them 1 stack of 'Dark Chakra Unseal'. Aftewards, Jiroubou gains 10 points of permanent destructible defense.

characters.name: Edo Tensei Kidoumaru (S)
characters.description: Reanimated by Kabuto during the Fourth Shinobi World War along with his Sound Four teammates, Kidoumaru is happy to be back in action and wreaking havoc once again. Terrorizing the battlefield with his many spider-based jutsu, enhanced by his Cursed Seal, Kidoumaru is a menace to all who cross his path.

skills.descriptionRaw: Kidoumaru enables his skills and targets all enemies permanently. Every time they use a new skill, they will gain 1 'Web Stack'. This skill ignores invulnerability. This skill will be replaced by 'Sticky Golden Arrow'.

skills.descriptionText: Kidoumaru deals 20 piercing damage to one enemy and stuns their non-mental skills for 1 turn. Afterwards, all enemies will be dealt 5 piercing damage for each 'Web Stack' they have.

characters.name: Edo Tensei Kimimaro (S)
characters.description: Edo Tensei Kimimaro was resurrected by Kabuto as an unfeeling weapon of war, his loyalty and discipline preserved even beyond death. He wields the Shikotsumyaku Kekkei Genkai to turn his own skeleton into blades and armor, growing stronger the longer he remains unbroken. Every strike hardens his defenses, and every moment of restraint builds toward an inevitable, bone-shattering end.

skills.name: Bone Rush
skills.descriptionRaw: Kimimaro rushes one enemy, dealing 20 damage to them and gaining 1 stack of 'Bone Spikes'. This skill will deal 10 additional damage for every 2 stacks of 'Bone Spikes'.
skills.descriptionText: Kimimaro rushes one enemy, dealing 20 damage to them and gaining 1 stack of 'Bone Spikes'. This skill will deal 10 additional damage for every 2 stacks of 'Bone Spikes'.

skills.descriptionText: Kimimaro unleashes sharpened bone shards at all enemies, dealing 15 piercing damage to them and gaining 1 stack of 'Bones Spikes'. This skill will deal 5 additional damage for every 2 stacks of 'Bone Spikes'.

skills.name: Dead Man's Skewer
skills.descriptionRaw: Kimimaro impales his opponents, dealing 40 piercing damage to one enemy and 15 piercing damage to all other enemies. This skill cannot be countered, and requires at least 4 stacks of 'Bone Spikes' to be used, and all stacks are removed afterwards.

characters.name: Edo Tensei Mangetsu (S)
characters.description: Reanimated by Kabuto during the Fourth Shinobi World War as one of the Seven Swordsmen of the Mist, Mangetsu was widely feared as the 'Second Coming of the Demon'. The older brother of Suigetsu, Mangetsu primarily used the Twin Sword, Hiramekarei, though he was famously a master of all seven blades.

skills.name: Hydrification Technique
skills.descriptionRaw: ET Mangetsu steals 20 health points from one enemy. For 1 turn, a random skill class will be chosen, and ET Mangetsu will ignore all enemy skills of that class, or none if no class is chosen.
skills.descriptionText: ET Mangetsu steals 20 health points from one enemy. For 1 turn, a random skill class will be chosen, and ET Mangetsu will ignore all enemy skills of that class, or none if no class is chosen.

skills.descriptionText: When this skill is used, ET Mangetsu will heal 2 health every turn for the rest of the game. This skill stacks and may only be used 5 times.

skills.name: Mist Sword Summoning
skills.descriptionRaw: Mangetsu randomly summons one of the Seven Swords, granting 'Hydrification Technique' a random unique effect every turn. characters.name: Edo Tensei Muu (S)
characters.description: Muu, the Second Tsuchikage, was revived against his will to fight. He is a skilled spy, capable of infiltrating the battlefield undetected, in addition to his Kekkei Touta, the atomic detachment, capable of turning enemies into dust in a matter of moments.

characters.name: Edo Tensei Sakon (S)
characters.description: Reanimated by Kabuto during the Fourth Shinobi World War along with their Sound Four teammates, Sakon and Ukon relish being on the battlefield once again. Dynamically splitting and merging their bodies through the use of their Cursed Seal, the twins fight as a powerful unit, showing no mercy to anyone.

characters.name: Edo Tensei Tayuya (S)
characters.description: Edo Tensei Tayuya was resurrected by Kabuto as a cruel battlefield conductor, her malice and arrogance undimmed by death. She uses her cursed flute to summon demonic warriors and unravel enemies through sound-based genjutsu and mental pressure. As the fight drags on, her control tightens, turning chaos into a carefully orchestrated nightmare.

characters.name: Edo Tensei Yagura (S)

His Water Mirror techniques allow him to capture, store, and return enemy techniques with deadly precision, turning an opponent’s own strength against them while remaining nearly untouchable.

If that enemy uses a new harmful skill, that skill will be permanently stored by 'Water Mirror' and they will deal 5 non-affliction less damage for 1 turn. A curious, naïve, and sensitive boy, Yota can manipulate the weather around himself, and is deployed by Kabuto to fight in the Fourth Shinobi World War.

characters.name: ET Susanoo Itachi (S)
characters.description: Having been reanimated once more, Itachi now manifests the full power of his Susanoo in battle. Shielded by the Yata Mirror and wielding the sealing Totsuka Blade, he becomes a relentless force that blends absolute defense with lethal precision.

skills.name: Totsuka Blade Sealing
skills.descriptionRaw: Itachi seals one enemy with his Susanoo's legendary blade, dealing 35 affliction damage to them, removing 1 random chakra and stunning their skills for 1 turn. This skill cannot be countered or reflected. This skill requires 'Edo Tensei Susanoo'.
skills.descriptionText: Itachi seals one enemy with his Susanoo's legendary blade, dealing 35 affliction damage to them, removing 1 random chakra and stunning their skills for 1 turn. This skill cannot be countered or reflected. This skill requires 'Edo Tensei Susanoo'.

skills.descriptionRaw: Itachi deals 15 piercing damage to one enemy. Permanently, that enemy will deal 5 less non-affliction damage. This skill requires 'Edo Tensei Susanoo'.
skills.descriptionText: Itachi deals 15 piercing damage to one enemy. Permanently, that enemy will deal 5 less non-affliction damage. This skill requires 'Edo Tensei Susanoo'.

skills.name: Skeletal Blade
skills.descriptionRaw: Using his Susanoo's skeletal blade, Itachi deals 20 piercing damage to them. Permanently, that enemy will receive 5 additional damage from harmful skills. This skill requires 'Edo Tensei Susanoo'.

skills.descriptionRaw: After this skill is used, the next time Itachi's health drops to 50 or less, Itachi's Susanoo will evolve to the next stage, improving his skills for the following 3 turns. During this time, Itachi's skills will steal health instead. During this time, this skill will be replaced by 'Yasaka Magatama'. Itachi cannot be killed until this skill is triggered.

characters.name: Female Animal Path Pein (S)
characters.description: One of Nagato's Six Paths of Pain, the Female Animal Path is a relentless and tactical combatant who overwhelms her enemies through the summoning of massive, destructive creatures. Calm and emotionless, she specializes in battlefield control, using her summons to pressure multiple opponents at once while remaining difficult to pin down.

skills.name: Animal Path Summoning
skills.descriptionRaw: Female Animal Path summons all pre-selected animals to the battlefield. For each animal summoned, Female Animal Path gains 10 destructible defense. Animals, when summoned, may not be pre-selected for the following 2 turn.
skills.descriptionText: Female Animal Path summons all pre-selected animals to the battlefield. For each animal summoned, Female Animal Path gains 10 destructible defense. Animals, when summoned, may not be pre-selected for the following 2 turn.

skills.descriptionText: Pre-selects this animal for the next use of 'Animal Path Summoning'. When active, deals 10 damage to all enemies for 3 turns. During this time, any enemy that does not use a new skill will take another 10 damage. This skill will be replaced by 'Stampeding Rhino'.

skills.descriptionRaw: Pre-selects this animal for the next use of 'Animal Path Summoning'. When active, grants Female Animal Path's team 20 points of destructible defense and 5% damage reduction.

skills.descriptionText: Pre-selects this animal for the next use of 'Animal Path Summoning'. For 3 turns, each turn a random enemy will take 20 damage and will have their non-affliction damage reduced by 10 for 1 turn. This skill will be relaced to 'Rampaging Buffalo' after use.

characters.name: Four Tail Kyuubi Naruto (S)
characters.description: After completely giving into his anger and manifesting a fourth tail, Naruto ceases to be himself. In this state, Naruto's own body is completely overtaken by a deep, dense Nine-Tails chakra cloak, and at the cost of huge internal damage, Naruto becomes a mindless monster; a being of pure rage and destruction.

skills.name: Four Tails Transformation
skills.descriptionRaw: Naruto gains 15 points of damage reduction and 20 points of destructible defense permanently. During this time, he cannot be stunned. Each turn Naruto uses a new harmful skill, he loses 10 health that cannot kill him. This skill will be replaced by 'Kyuubi Chakra Gather'.
skills.descriptionText: Naruto gains 15 points of damage reduction and 20 points of destructible defense permanently. During this time, he cannot be stunned. Each turn Naruto uses a new harmful skill, he loses 10 health that cannot kill him. This skill will be replaced by 'Kyuubi Chakra Gather'.

skills.name: Shockwave Smash
skills.descriptionRaw: Naruto smahes the ground, generating a violent shockwave and dealing 15 piercing damage to all enemies. The following turn, 'Four Tailed Beast Bomb' will cost 1 less random chakra. Requires 'Four Tails Transformation'.
skills.descriptionText: Naruto smahes the ground, generating a violent shockwave and dealing 15 piercing damage to all enemies. The following turn, 'Four Tailed Beast Bomb' will cost 1 less random chakra. Requires 'Four Tails Transformation'.

characters.name: Fukasaku and Shima (S)
characters.description: Fukasaku and Shima (S) are known as the two great sage toads of Mount Myoboku. They taught both Jiraiya and Naruto sage jutsu and are each skilled in elemental techniques as well as genjutsu techniques.

skills.descriptionRaw: Fukasaku and Shima (S) use their pattened genjustu to use Frog Song. They target 1 enemy and deal 15 affliction damage for 2 turns. During Toad Confrontation Singing this skill will cost 1 random chakra instead.
skills.descriptionText: Fukasaku and Shima (S) use their pattened genjustu to use Frog Song. They target 1 enemy and deal 15 affliction damage for 2 turns. During Toad Confrontation Singing this skill will cost 1 random chakra instead.

characters.name: Gaara of the Desert
characters.description: A Jinchuuriki from the Village of Sand, Gaara is an unstable ninja with the Shukaku, the one-tailed beast. With the Shukaku, and his own abilities, Gaara can manipulate the sand in his gourd to crush the enemy, or defend himself.

skills.descriptionRaw: Gaara crushes one enemy with sand, that enemy will be <Damage>dealt 50 piercing damage<Damage> and all <SkillName>'Desert Coffin'<SkillName> stacks will be <Classes>removed<Classes> from them. This skill <Classes>cannot be countered<Classes>.
skills.descriptionText: Gaara crushes one enemy with sand, that enemy will be dealt 50 piercing damage and all 'Desert Coffin' stacks will be removed from them. This skill cannot be countered.

Permanently, that enemy will <Improvements>receive 25 additional damage<Improvements> from <SkillName>'Desert Graveyard'<SkillName>. This skill stacks.
skills.descriptionText: Gaara surrounds one enemy with a pile of sand, stunning their non-mental skills for 1 turn. Permanently, that enemy will receive 25 additional damage from 'Desert Graveyard'. This skill stacks.

Afterwards, all the additional damage from <SkillName>'Eavesdrop'<SkillName> and <SkillName>'Crescent Moon Slash'<SkillName> will be <Effects>removed<Effects> and <Effects>converted<Effects> into permanent <Defense>damage reduction<Defense>, in percentage.

characters.name: Hachibi Bee (S)
characters.description: Having fully bonded with and gained control of the Eight-Tails, Gyuuki, and thus having become what is known as a perfect jinchuuriki, Killer Bee is able to use its abilities to their fullest extent. Using the Eight-Tails' protective chakra to gradually become much stronger, Bee can run a rampage on the battlefield.

At 2 Hachibi Stacks, he gains 30% unpierceable damage reduction. At 3 Hachibi Stacks, he gains 50% unpierceable damage reduction and heals 5 health.

At 2 Hachibi Stacks, this skill will instead deal 40 damage to one enemy and stuns the harmful skills of all other enemies for 1 turn; At 3 Hachibi Stacks, deals 65 piercing damage to one enemy ignoring invulnerability.

skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Hachibi Bee (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

characters.name: Haku
characters.description: The sole survivor of the Yuki clan, and the subordinate of Zabuza; Haku, despite being young, holds enough potential strength to surpass almost any ninja. Using his ice based bloodline, and his intelligence, Haku can attack and defend nearly simultaneously.

This skill will <Improvements>deal an additional 10 damage<Improvements> to that enemy if <Effects>they are stunned<Effects>. While improved, this skill will <Damage>deal 40 piercing damage<Damage> to the target instead.

During this time, Haku gains 30 <Defense>points of destructible defense<Defense> and <Defense>ignores stun effects<Defense>.

During <SkillName>'Inner Sakura'<SkillName>, this skill will <Improvements>deal 10 additional damage<Improvements>.

skills.descriptionText: Using basic healing techniques, Sakura heals herself or an ally for 25 health.

skills.descriptionRaw: Sakura's inner self surfaces and urges her on. For 4 turns, Sakura will gain <Defense>10 points of damage reduction<Defense>. During this time, Sakura will <Defense>ignore non-damage effects<Defense> and <SkillName>'KO Punch'<SkillName> will <Improvements>deal 10 additional damage<Improvements>.

If used on an ally, all <Damage>harmful effects<Damage> on them will be <Defense>removed<Defense> and they will <Defense>become invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn. This skill <Invisible>ignores invulnerability<Invisible>.

characters.name: Hidan (S)
characters.description: Hidan(s) is a member of Akatsuki and a worshiper of the obscure god Jashin. He is apparently immortal and has perhaps the foulest mouth of the entire criminal organization.

skills.name: Reaping Scythe
skills.descriptionRaw: Hidan (S) attacks one enemy with his scythe dealing 15 damage to them and he gains 10 permanent destructible defense. 'Curse of Jashin' may be used on the targeted enemy the following turn. This skill cannot be used on an enemy affected by 'Curse of Jashin'.
skills.descriptionText: Hidan (S) attacks one enemy with his scythe dealing 15 damage to them and he gains 10 permanent destructible defense. 'Curse of Jashin' may be used on the targeted enemy the following turn. This skill cannot be used on an enemy affected by 'Curse of Jashin'.

skills.name: Curse of Jashin
skills.descriptionRaw: Hidan curses an enemy. For 2 turns, all harmful skills used on Hidan will be reflected upon the cursed enemy. During this time, 'Impale' may be used. This skill ignores invulnerability and cannot be countered or reflected.

characters.name: Hiruko Sasori (S)
characters.description: Hiruko is a puppet used by the Akatsuki shinobi, Sasori. Serving as a 'puppet armor', it allowed Sasori to hide inside of it. Hiruko is a human puppet made from the corpse of a renowned shinobi - this puppet is also Sasori's favorite.

skills.name: Poisonous Tail Stab
skills.descriptionRaw: Deal 15 Affliction damage to one enemy and apply 'Venom Stack'. This skill will cost 1 random chakra for 1 turn after being used. If the target already has a 'Venom Stack', deal an additional 5 damage per stack and place a 'Venom Stack' on all other enemies.

skills.descriptionRaw: For 1 turn, Hiruko or an ally ignores all damage dealt. During this turn, each enemy that uses a new skill on them takes 10 affliction damage* and gains 1 'Venom Stack'. This skill is Invisible. This skill ends if Hiruko Dies.

skills.name: Puppet Reveal

skills.descriptionText: Sasori activates 'Puppet Reveal'. The next time his health reaches 50 or less, he will gain 20 points of destructible defense for 3 turns. During this time, 'Sand Close Trap' and 'Puppet Reveal' will be replaced. This skill is invisible and can only be used once.

characters.description: Formerly one of the Seven Swordsmen of the Mist Village, Kisame is an S-Rank missing nin. He is Itachi's partner and a member of a mysterious organization. Designed with Redxmaverick.

Each turn, the first enemy to use a new harmful skill will be marked, causing all other hungry sharks to attack only the marked enemy next turn. This skill cannot be removed; Ends if Kisame dies.

While young, Hanabi's skills surpass her elder sister's, and although unable to utilize her byakugan yet and lacking in physical strength, Hanabi makes up for it with her tenacity and speed.

characters.description: A Genin from Team 8, Kiba is a member of the Inuzuka clan, and is both short-tempered and impulsive. Using his dog, Akamaru, Kiba is capable of powerful taijutsu or fusing with Akamaru to become a deadly double headed dog.

skills.name: Garouga
skills.descriptionRaw: Kiba <Damage>deals 30 damage<Damage> to one enemy. During <SkillName>'Double Headed Wolf'<SkillName>, this skill is improved and will <Improvements>cost 1 less random chakra<Improvements>.
skills.descriptionText: Kiba deals 30 damage to one enemy. During 'Double Headed Wolf', this skill is improved and will cost 1 less random chakra.

skills.name: Double Headed Wolf
skills.descriptionRaw: Kiba and Akamaru turn into a giant beast and attack all enemies, <Damage>dealing 15 damage<Damage> to them for 3 turns. The following 3 turns, <SkillName>'Garouga'<SkillName> is improved and will <Improvements>cost 1 less random chakra<Improvements>. During this time, Kiba gains 50% <Defense>unpierceable damage reduction<Defense>.
skills.descriptionText: Kiba and Akamaru turn into a giant beast and attack all enemies, dealing 15 damage to them for 3 turns. The following 3 turns, 'Garouga' is improved and will cost 1 less random chakra. During this time, Kiba gains 50% unpierceable damage reduction.

skills.name: Dynamic Air Marking
skills.descriptionRaw: Akamaru sprays urine on one enemy who cannot <Defense>reduce damage<Defense> or <Defense>become invulnerable<Defense> for 3 turns. During this time, <SkillName>'Double Headed Wolf'<SkillName> and <SkillName>'Garouga'<SkillName> will <Improvements>deal 10 additional damage<Improvements> to them. This skill <Improvements>may not be used<Improvements> on an enemy already affected by it.
skills.descriptionText: Akamaru sprays urine on one enemy who cannot reduce damage or become invulnerable for 3 turns. During this time, 'Double Headed Wolf' and 'Garouga' will deal 10 additional damage to them. This skill may not be used on an enemy already affected by it.

skills.name: Smoke Bomb
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Inuzuka Kiba <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Inuzuka Kiba invulnerable for 1 turn.

characters.name: Inuzuka Kiba (S)
characters.description: After two years, Kiba finally becomes a chuunin. Now with Akamaru grown up, they become an unbeatable fighting unit, taking the Inuzuka clan's techniques to the next level. Now both have more precision for massive attacks, and an even sharper sense of smell.

skills.name: Man Beast Clone
skills.descriptionRaw: Kiba grant himself and one ally 5 <Defense>damage reduction<Defense>. If Kiba use a <Classes>new harmful skill<Classes>, that ally gains 10 <Defense>destructible defense<Defense> for 1 turn. If that ally uses a  <Classes>new harmful skill <Classes>, Kiba <Improvements>gains 5 additional damage<Improvements> for 1 turn; Doesn't stack. Becomes <SkillName>'Enhanced Garouga'<SkillName>, cannot be <Classes>removed<Classes>.
skills.descriptionText: Kiba grant himself and one ally 5 damage reduction. If Kiba use a new harmful skill, that ally gains 10 destructible defense for 1 turn. If that ally uses a new harmful skill , Kiba gains 5 additional damage for 1 turn; Doesn't stack. Becomes 'Enhanced Garouga', cannot be removed.

skills.name: Piercing Fang
skills.descriptionRaw: Kiba <Damage>deals 20 piercing damage<Damage> to one enemy. For 1 turn, Kiba will <Defense>ignore stun effects<Defense> and his other skills will cost <Improvements>1 random chakra less<Improvements>.
skills.descriptionText: Kiba deals 20 piercing damage to one enemy. For 1 turn, Kiba will ignore stun effects and his other skills will cost 1 random chakra less.

skills.name: Fang Over Fang
skills.descriptionRaw: Kiba <Damage>deals 20 damage<Damage> to all enemies this turn. For 2 turns, Kiba will <Improvements>deal 5 more damage<Improvements> on them.
skills.descriptionText: Kiba deals 20 damage to all enemies this turn. For 2 turns, Kiba will deal 5 more damage on them.

skills.name: Hide in the Shade
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Inuzuka Kiba (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Inuzuka Kiba (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Enhanced Garouga
skills.descriptionRaw: Kiba <Damage>deals 30 piercing damage<Damage> to one enemy and <Effects>stuns<Effects> all other enemies <Classes>Harmful<Classes> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: Kiba deals 30 piercing damage to one enemy and stuns all other enemies Harmful for 1 turn.

characters.name: Inuzuka Tsume (S)
characters.description: A Konoha jounin, a member of the Inuzuka clan, and the mother of Kiba, Tsume, much like her son, is a wild and impatient woman with an often odd sense of humor. Like other members of her clan, Tsume fights one with her companion, Kuromaru, while allowing her wild instincts to take over.

skills.name: Summon Kuromaru
skills.descriptionRaw: Tsume calls Kuromaru to aid her. The following 4 turns, she will gain 50% points of damage reduction. During this time, this skill will be replaced by 'Fierce Bite' and any enemy that uses a new harmful non-affliction skill on Tsume will receive 10 damage.
skills.descriptionText: Tsume calls Kuromaru to aid her. The following 4 turns, she will gain 50% points of damage reduction. During this time, this skill will be replaced by 'Fierce Bite' and any enemy that uses a new harmful non-affliction skill on Tsume will receive 10 damage.

skills.name: Passing Fang
skills.descriptionRaw: Tsume spins, dealing 15 piercing damage to one enemy for 2 turns. All stun skills that enemy uses will also be decreased by 2 turns. If 'Summon Kuromaru' is active, this skill will deal 5 additional damage.
skills.descriptionText: Tsume spins, dealing 15 piercing damage to one enemy for 2 turns. All stun skills that enemy uses will also be decreased by 2 turns. If 'Summon Kuromaru' is active, this skill will deal 5 additional damage.

skills.name: Flashbang
skills.descriptionRaw: Tsume covers herself and her allies, making them invulnerable to all non-affliction skills for 1 turn. Tsume only carries 3 of these grenades with her at all times, so this skill can only be used three times in a game.
skills.descriptionText: Tsume covers herself and her allies, making them invulnerable to all non-affliction skills for 1 turn. Tsume only carries 3 of these grenades with her at all times, so this skill can only be used three times in a game.

skills.name: Man-Beast Defense
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Inuzuka Tsume (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Inuzuka Tsume (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Fierce Bite
skills.descriptionRaw: Kuromaru jumps at one enemy dealing 25 damage which ignores invulnerability. If that enemy dies this turn, then for 2 turns Tsume will have her damage increased by 10, will ignore all stun effects and cannot be killed.
skills.descriptionText: Kuromaru jumps at one enemy dealing 25 damage which ignores invulnerability. If that enemy dies this turn, then for 2 turns Tsume will have her damage increased by 10, will ignore all stun effects and cannot be killed.

characters.name: Itachi Body Double (S)
characters.description: By using one of Pein's techniques a Sand Nin spy for Akatsuki is changed to look like Itachi. The body double is controlled by Itachi but only has a third of his chakra.

skills.name: Finger Genjutsu
skills.descriptionRaw: Itachi affects one enemy with Finger Genjutsu for 1 turn. If the affected enemy uses any skill on Itachi Body Double (S) or his allies that skill will be countered and that enemy will take 10 damage and Itachi Body Double (S) will gain 1 genjutsu chakra. The target of this skill is invisible.
skills.descriptionText: Itachi affects one enemy with Finger Genjutsu for 1 turn. If the affected enemy uses any skill on Itachi Body Double (S) or his allies that skill will be countered and that enemy will take 10 damage and Itachi Body Double (S) will gain 1 genjutsu chakra. The target of this skill is invisible.

skills.name: Genjutsu Reversal
skills.descriptionRaw: For 2 turns if any enemy uses a skill which is non-unique on Itachi Body Double (S), he will reflect that skill onto the enemy who used it. This skill is invisible.
skills.descriptionText: For 2 turns if any enemy uses a skill which is non-unique on Itachi Body Double (S), he will reflect that skill onto the enemy who used it. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Goukakyuu no Jutsu
skills.descriptionRaw: Itachi Body Double (S) creates a large fireball that scorches the battlefield. One enemy takes 20 damage. The following turn all enemies take an additional 10 affliction damage.*
skills.descriptionText: Itachi Body Double (S) creates a large fireball that scorches the battlefield. One enemy takes 20 damage. The following turn all enemies take an additional 10 affliction damage.*

skills.name: Illusionary Raven Bunshin
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Itachi Body Double (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Itachi Body Double (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

characters.name: Izumo and Kotetsu (S)
characters.description: Part of the Nijuu Shoutai, Izumo and Kotetsu are almost always found together and work together excellently as a combat team.

skills.name: Mace Crush
skills.descriptionRaw: Kotetsu summons a giant mace and slams it against one enemy, <Damage>dealing 30 damage<Damage> to them. This skill will <Improvements>deal 10 more damage<Improvements> if the enemy has been <Effects>stunned<Effects> by the <SkillName>'Starch Syrup Capturing Field'<SkillName>.
skills.descriptionText: Kotetsu summons a giant mace and slams it against one enemy, dealing 30 damage to them. This skill will deal 10 more damage if the enemy has been stunned by the 'Starch Syrup Capturing Field'.

skills.name: Starch Syrup Capturing Field
skills.descriptionRaw: Izumo Spits out a field of sticky skyrup making it harder for the enemy team to move around. For 2 turns, any enemy that <Classes>uses a new non-mental skill<Classes>, including Affliction as a separated class, will have that specif class of skill <Effects>stunned<Effects> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: Izumo Spits out a field of sticky skyrup making it harder for the enemy team to move around. For 2 turns, any enemy that uses a new non-mental skill, including Affliction as a separated class, will have that specif class of skill stunned for 1 turn.

skills.name: Devastate
skills.descriptionRaw: Izumo moves to hit an enemy from the left. For the next 3 turns, if <SkillName>'Annihilate'<SkillName> is used on that target, they will <Damage>take 65 damage<Damage>.
skills.descriptionText: Izumo moves to hit an enemy from the left. For the next 3 turns, if 'Annihilate' is used on that target, they will take 65 damage.

skills.name: Tag Team
skills.descriptionRaw: Izumo swap, exchanging his <Defense>health points<Defense> for Kotetsu's. If Izumo or Kotetsu is <Classes>killed<Classes> during this time, the other will take permanent control. During this period, <SkillName>'Devastate'<SkillName> will be replaced by <SkillName>'Annihilate'<SkillName>. This skill can be used again to <Classes>exchange<Classes> <Defense>health points<Defense>. This skill cannot be <Classes>ignored<Classes> or <Classes>removed<Classes>.
skills.descriptionText: Izumo swap, exchanging his health points for Kotetsu's. If Izumo or Kotetsu is killed during this time, the other will take permanent control. During this period, 'Devastate' will be replaced by 'Annihilate'. This skill can be used again to exchange health points. This skill cannot be ignored or removed.

skills.name: Annihilate
skills.descriptionRaw: Kotetsu moves to hit an enemy from the right. For the next 3 turns, if <SkillName>'Devastate'<SkillName> is used on that target, they will <Damage>take 65 damage<Damage>.
skills.descriptionText: Kotetsu moves to hit an enemy from the right. For the next 3 turns, if 'Devastate' is used on that target, they will take 65 damage.

characters.name: Jiraiya
characters.description: Jiraiya is one of the Legendary Sannin. With his various frog-based jutsus he is able to both hinder and damage all of his opponents.

skills.name: Toad Mouth Bind
skills.descriptionRaw: Jiraiya summons the stomach of a giant toad, placing all characters within it. For 2 turns, enemies will will <Improvements>receive 25% more damage<Improvements> from <Classes>harmful skills<Classes> and Jiraiya's team will <Defense>gain 20% damage reduction<Defense>.
skills.descriptionText: Jiraiya summons the stomach of a giant toad, placing all characters within it. For 2 turns, enemies will will receive 25% more damage from harmful skills and Jiraiya's team will gain 20% damage reduction.

skills.name: Major Summoning: Gamabunta
skills.descriptionRaw: Jiraiya summons Gamabunta in the battlefield, <Damage>dealing 35 damage<Damage> to all enemies. If targetable, Jiraiya will become <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn and will <Effects>gain 1 random chakra<Effects>. This skill cannot be <Classes>countered<Classes>.
skills.descriptionText: Jiraiya summons Gamabunta in the battlefield, dealing 35 damage to all enemies. If targetable, Jiraiya will become invulnerable for 1 turn and will gain 1 random chakra. This skill cannot be countered.

skills.name: Great Fireball Technique
skills.descriptionRaw: Jiraiya spits a giant fireball at all enemies, <Damage>dealing 20 affliction damage<Damage> to one enemy and 10 <Damage>affliction damage<Damage> to all other enemies.
skills.descriptionText: Jiraiya spits a giant fireball at all enemies, dealing 20 affliction damage to one enemy and 10 affliction damage to all other enemies.

skills.name: Spiked Buddha
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Jiraiya <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Jiraiya invulnerable for 1 turn.

characters.name: Jiraiya (S)
characters.description: Jiraiya (S) is one of the legendary Sannin that were trained by the third Hokage. Also known as the toad sage, he has been Uzumaki Naruto's teacher for the past few years.

skills.name: Toad Oil Projectile
skills.descriptionRaw: Jiraiya spits a very dense oil at all enemies, dealing 10 affliction damage to them. Permanently, all enemies will receive 10 additional damage from 'Katon Endan'. Enemies marked by 'Wild Lion Mane' will have their action and control skills ended. This skill is replaced by 'Katon Endan' after being used.
skills.descriptionText: Jiraiya spits a very dense oil at all enemies, dealing 10 affliction damage to them. Permanently, all enemies will receive 10 additional damage from 'Katon Endan'. Enemies marked by 'Wild Lion Mane' will have their action and control skills ended. This skill is replaced by 'Katon Endan' after being used.

skills.name: Jiraya's Rasengan
skills.descriptionRaw: Jiraya hits an opponent with his Rasengan, dealing 30 damage to them. For 1 turn, that enemy will deal 10 less non-affliction damage. If Used on an enemy marked by 'Wild Lion Mane', that enemy will take 10 additional damage.
skills.descriptionText: Jiraya hits an opponent with his Rasengan, dealing 30 damage to them. For 1 turn, that enemy will deal 10 less non-affliction damage. If Used on an enemy marked by 'Wild Lion Mane', that enemy will take 10 additional damage.

skills.name: Wild Lion Mane
skills.descriptionRaw: Jiraiya will protect himself or an ally for 2 turns. If an enemy uses a new skill on that ally, they will take 10 piercing damage and will deal 15 less non-affliction damage for 1 turn. This skill is invisible.
skills.descriptionText: Jiraiya will protect himself or an ally for 2 turns. If an enemy uses a new skill on that ally, they will take 10 piercing damage and will deal 15 less non-affliction damage for 1 turn. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Summoning Gamaken
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Jiraiya <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Jiraiya invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Katon Endan
skills.descriptionRaw: Jiraiya emits a jet of fire from his mouth, dealing 20 damage to one enemy. This skill is replaced by 'Toad Oil Projectile' after being used.
skills.descriptionText: Jiraiya emits a jet of fire from his mouth, dealing 20 damage to one enemy. This skill is replaced by 'Toad Oil Projectile' after being used.

characters.name: Jiroubou
characters.description: Jiroubou is the largest member of the Sound four. His fighting style involves powerful physical attacks in combination with manipulation of earth.

skills.name: Nirvana Fist Style
skills.descriptionRaw: Jiroubou <Damage>deals 30 damage<Damage> to one enemy. The following turn, <SkillName>'Earth Seal Mud Cannonball'<SkillName> will <Improvements>deal 10 additional damage<Improvements>.
skills.descriptionText: Jiroubou deals 30 damage to one enemy. The following turn, 'Earth Seal Mud Cannonball' will deal 10 additional damage.

skills.name: Earth Seal Mud Cannonball
skills.descriptionRaw: Jiroubou <Damage>deals 20 damage<Damage> to all enemies. The following turn, <SkillName>'Nirvana Fist Style'<SkillName> will <Improvements>deal 10 additional damage<Improvements>.
skills.descriptionText: Jiroubou deals 20 damage to all enemies. The following turn, 'Nirvana Fist Style' will deal 10 additional damage.

skills.name: Dungeon Chamber of Nothingness
skills.descriptionRaw: Jiroubou captures the enemy team in a prison of earth, <Effects>stealing 2 random chakra<Effects> from their pool. Jiroubou and all allies <Defense>become invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: Jiroubou captures the enemy team in a prison of earth, stealing 2 random chakra from their pool. Jiroubou and all allies become invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Earth Wall Land Flip
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Jiroubou <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Jiroubou invulnerable for 1 turn.

characters.name: Juugo (S)
characters.description: Juugo (S) is the origin of the cursed seal and now follows Sasuke. He can either be a calm natured person or a psychotic lunatic.

skills.name: Compression Blast
skills.descriptionRaw: Juugo (S) deals 30 piercing damage to 1 enemy and stuns their physical and chakra skills for 1 turn. During Killer Impulse this skill will be improved and will cost 2 random chakra.
skills.descriptionText: Juugo (S) deals 30 piercing damage to 1 enemy and stuns their physical and chakra skills for 1 turn. During Killer Impulse this skill will be improved and will cost 2 random chakra.

skills.name: Killer Impulse
skills.descriptionRaw: Juugo (S) enters a killing rage. He gains 75% damage reduction for 3 turns. Three random enemies will take 25 piercing damage each turn once the following 3 turns and 'Compression Blast' will be improved during this time. The selected enemies are invisible. This skill ignores invulnerability.
skills.descriptionText: Juugo (S) enters a killing rage. He gains 75% damage reduction for 3 turns. Three random enemies will take 25 piercing damage each turn once the following 3 turns and 'Compression Blast' will be improved during this time. The selected enemies are invisible. This skill ignores invulnerability.

skills.name: Fusion
skills.descriptionRaw: Juugo (S) heals 1 ally for 25 health and that ally gains 20 destructible defense permanently. Each time this skill is used Juugo (S)'s cooldowns will increase by 1 turn for 4 turns.
skills.descriptionText: Juugo (S) heals 1 ally for 25 health and that ally gains 20 destructible defense permanently. Each time this skill is used Juugo (S)'s cooldowns will increase by 1 turn for 4 turns.

skills.name: Isolation
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Juugo (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Juugo (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

characters.name: Kakuzu (S)
characters.description: A missing-nin of mysterious talents and a member of Akatsuki, Kakuzu(s) is certainly older than he appears. He seems to only be concerned with money and the bounties which provide him with it.

skills.name: Fuuton Atsugai
skills.descriptionRaw: Fuuton Atsugai deals 30 damage to one enemy and stuns their non-affliction skills for 1 turn. The following turn, this skill will be replaced by 'Katon Zukokku'.
skills.descriptionText: Fuuton Atsugai deals 30 damage to one enemy and stuns their non-affliction skills for 1 turn. The following turn, this skill will be replaced by 'Katon Zukokku'.

skills.name: Raiton Gian
skills.descriptionRaw: Raiton Gian deals 30 piercing damage to one enemy. The following turn, this skill will be replaced by 'Inferno Gust'.
skills.descriptionText: Raiton Gian deals 30 piercing damage to one enemy. The following turn, this skill will be replaced by 'Inferno Gust'.

skills.name: Heart Steal
skills.descriptionRaw: Using his tendrils, Kakuzu rips the heart out of one enemy and makes it his own. Kakuzu instantly kills that enemy and heals 35 health. This skill can only be used on an enemy at or below 35 health. This skill ignores invulnerability.
skills.descriptionText: Using his tendrils, Kakuzu rips the heart out of one enemy and makes it his own. Kakuzu instantly kills that enemy and heals 35 health. This skill can only be used on an enemy at or below 35 health. This skill ignores invulnerability.

skills.name: Iron Skin Technique
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Kakuzu (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Kakuzu (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Katon Zukokku
skills.descriptionRaw: Katon Zukokku deals 15 affliction damage to all enemies.
skills.descriptionText: Katon Zukokku deals 15 affliction damage to all enemies.

skills.name: Inferno Gust
skills.descriptionRaw: Inferno gust deal 40 damage to one enemy and 15 to all other enemies.
skills.descriptionText: Inferno gust deal 40 damage to one enemy and 15 to all other enemies.

characters.name: Kankuro
characters.description: The brother of Gaara, and a master puppeeter, Kankuro is one of the three sand siblings. With his puppets, Kankuro is able to use the varied abilities hidden inside them to attack his enemies, or even protect himself.

skills.name: Black Secret Machine One Shot
skills.descriptionRaw: Kankuro uses two of his puppets to stab one enemy, <Damage>dealing 30 piercing damage<Damage> to them. During <SkillName>'Puppet Preparation'<SkillName>, this skill will <Improvements>deal an additional 5 damage<Improvements>.
skills.descriptionText: Kankuro uses two of his puppets to stab one enemy, dealing 30 piercing damage to them. During 'Puppet Preparation', this skill will deal an additional 5 damage.

skills.name: Poison Bomb
skills.descriptionRaw: One of Kankuro's puppets creates a cloud of smoke, <Damage>dealing 10 affliction damage<Damage> to all enemies. During <SkillName>'Puppet Preparation'<SkillName>, this skill will <Improvements>last 1 additional turn<Improvements>.
skills.descriptionText: One of Kankuro's puppets creates a cloud of smoke, dealing 10 affliction damage to all enemies. During 'Puppet Preparation', this skill will last 1 additional turn.

skills.name: Puppet Preparation
skills.descriptionRaw: Kankuro prepares his puppets for combat, <Defense>gaining 10 points of destructible defense<Defense> for 4 turns. The following 3 turns, Kankuro's skills will <Improvements>be improved<Improvements>.
skills.descriptionText: Kankuro prepares his puppets for combat, gaining 10 points of destructible defense for 4 turns. The following 3 turns, Kankuro's skills will be improved.

skills.name: Puppet Replacement Technique
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Kankuro <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Kankuro invulnerable for 1 turn.

characters.name: Kankuro (S)
characters.description: In the last couple years Kankuro(s) has become a Jounin and has created a new puppet. He is now able to harness three puppets at once and is a more versatile combatant.

skills.name: Kuroari Trap
skills.descriptionRaw: Kankuro traps one enemy for 1 turn. If that enemy uses a new harmful skill, they will be countered and receive 15 additional damage from 'Karasu Knives'. This skill is invisible.
skills.descriptionText: Kankuro traps one enemy for 1 turn. If that enemy uses a new harmful skill, they will be countered and receive 15 additional damage from 'Karasu Knives'. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Karasu Knives
skills.descriptionRaw: Kankuro assaults one enemy with poisoned knives, dealing 25 damage to them and that enemy will take 10 affliction damage the following turn*. For 1 turn, this skill will be replaced by 'Karasu: Finishing Knive'.
skills.descriptionText: Kankuro assaults one enemy with poisoned knives, dealing 25 damage to them and that enemy will take 10 affliction damage the following turn*. For 1 turn, this skill will be replaced by 'Karasu: Finishing Knive'.

skills.name: Sanshouo Shield
skills.descriptionRaw: Kankuro uses Sanshouo to block enemy attacks. For 3 turns, Kankuro and his allies gain 5 points of damage reduction and are immune to affliction damage. During this time, this skill will be replaced by 'Salamander Puppet'. This skill ends if Kankuro dies.
skills.descriptionText: Kankuro uses Sanshouo to block enemy attacks. For 3 turns, Kankuro and his allies gain 5 points of damage reduction and are immune to affliction damage. During this time, this skill will be replaced by 'Salamander Puppet'. This skill ends if Kankuro dies.

skills.name: Puppet Distraction
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Kankuro (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionText: This skill makes Kankuro (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Karasu: Finishing Knive
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill deals 20 piercing damage to one enemy.
skills.descriptionText: This skill deals 20 piercing damage to one enemy.

skills.name: Salamander Puppet
skills.descriptionRaw: Kankuro protects himself or an ally for 1 turn, that ally will gain 20 points of unpierceable damage reduction.
skills.descriptionText: Kankuro protects himself or an ally for 1 turn, that ally will gain 20 points of unpierceable damage reduction.

characters.name: Karatachi Yagura
characters.description: The Fourth Mizukage of the Hidden Mist Village, Yagura is also the jinchuuriki host of the Three-Tailed Beast, Isobu. A tragic character manipulated by "Uchiha Madara" throughout his infamously bloody reign, Yagura uses the Three-Tails' unique mist and coral-based abilities in battle to efficiently hinder his enemies.

skills.name: Isobu: Tailed Beast Bomb
skills.descriptionRaw: Yagura <Defense>heals<Defense> 5 <Defense>health<Defense> and <Damage>deals 20 damage<Damage> to one enemy. This skill  <Improvements>deals 10 additional damage <Improvements> for every 15 <Defense>extra health it heals<Defense>.
skills.descriptionText: Yagura heals 5 health and deals 20 damage to one enemy. This skill deals 10 additional damage for every 15 extra health it heals.

skills.name: Bloodshed
skills.descriptionRaw: Yagura <Damage>deals 10 piercing damage<Damage> to all enemies. For 2 turns, if an enemy does not use a <Classes>new skill<Classes>, their skills will have <Effects>1 additional cooldown<Effects> for 1 turn, otherwise, <SkillName>'Isobu: Tailed Beast Bomb'<SkillName> will <Improvements>heal 5 additional health permanently<Improvements>. This skill stacks and cannot be <Classes>countered<Classes>.
skills.descriptionText: Yagura deals 10 piercing damage to all enemies. For 2 turns, if an enemy does not use a new skill, their skills will have 1 additional cooldown for 1 turn, otherwise, 'Isobu: Tailed Beast Bomb' will heal 5 additional health permanently. This skill stacks and cannot be countered.

skills.name: Isobu Transformation
skills.descriptionRaw: For 1 turn, Yagura will <Defense>ignore stun effects<Defense> and <SkillName>'Bloodshed'<SkillName> will <Improvements>cost 1 random chakra<Improvements>. Permanently, everytime Yagura <Classes>uses a new skill<Classes>, he <Defense>will ignore all stun effects<Defense> for 1 turn. During this time, this skill can be used to make <SkillName>'Bloodshed'<SkillName>  cost 1 random chakra for 1 turn. This skill cannot be <Classes>removed<Classes>.
skills.descriptionText: For 1 turn, Yagura will ignore stun effects and 'Bloodshed' will cost 1 random chakra. Permanently, everytime Yagura uses a new skill, he will ignore all stun effects for 1 turn. During this time, this skill can be used to make 'Bloodshed' cost 1 random chakra for 1 turn. This skill cannot be removed.

skills.name: Isobu: Chakra Skin
skills.descriptionRaw: This skill makes Yagura <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.
